headline: Rockwell Automation (ROK) Helps Cranswick Automate Packaging System
summary: Rockwell Automation, Inc. (NYSE:ROK) is one of the 15 Best AI Stocks That Will Make You Rich in 10 Years. On June 23, 2026, Rockwell Automation, Inc. (NYSE:ROK) announced that Cranswick commissioned a new robotic end-of-line pick-and-place system using Autonox Robotics. Cranswick produces millions of “pigs-in-blankets” for the Christmas market each year, and the final […]
